title: indigofera lasiantha
intro: Indigofera lasiantha, also known as Yellow Indigo, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Indigofera lasiantha include its potential to support skin health, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Indigofera lasiantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional skincare products and topical creams.
